release_notes: Probe gets --single-process to skip the chrome.exe stub's sandbox-init FATAL DCHECK that fires before --no-sandbox is parsed (0.3.74 confirmed the issue isn't Cyrillic — DCHECK fires on ASCII paths too). Strict empty-DOM check on probe exit: an empty body no longer reports 'Тест завершён 0 из 0' as success — now raises the captured stderr so the failure is visible. If --single-process doesn't help, next step is rebuilding Chromium with is_official_build=true.
